contract_change.rationale: DSP ABI 1.2 adds independently owned per-stream engine handles; runtime and header versions must advance together.

harness.ambient_conditions: Windows host; final native source c889be8; adb empty; no CMake, Ninja, compiler, Gradle, Java, qemu, or emulator process at start; total CPU samples 7.31%, 10.17%, 6.49%, 3.94%, 1.33%; no Echidna build, device, or validation lane overlap

methodology.safety_gate_uses: unloaded p99 <= max(30ms, safety_factor * buffer duration)

scope: host processing cost only; not Android callback, HAL, acoustic, or end-to-end latency
